arts.ttl: How PSG's 'midfield engine' and 'incredible' Dembele secured victory against Brest - MOTD analysis
arts.sum: Match of the Day's Nedum Onuoha analyses how Vitinha, Joao Neves and Ousmane Dembele led PSG to an impressive 3-0 victory over French rivals Brest in the first leg of their Champions League play-offs.

arts.ttl: Dembele scores twice as PSG beat Brest
arts.sum: Paris St-Germain take control of their all-France Champions League play-off against Brest, as Ousmane Dembele continues his phenomenal scoring form with another two goals.
